channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19378] interop sanity-hsm test_254b: FAIL: Expected '54' (!= '48') active restore requests
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/43b1bf21-878f-44e6-bb9b-888d50b90943

test_254b failed with the following error:

== sanity-hsm test 254b: Request counters are correctly incremented and decremented ========================================================== 05:10:08 (1757999408)
Will launch 54 requests of each type
CMD: onyx-155vm137 mkdir -p /tmp/arc1/sanity-hsm.test_254b/
Starting copytool 'agt1' on 'onyx-155vm137' with cmdline 'lhsmtool_posix --archive-format=v2 --hsm-root=/tmp/arc1/sanity-hsm.test_254b/ --daemon --pid-file=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid  "/mnt/lustre2"'
CMD: onyx-155vm137 lhsmtool_posix --archive-format=v2 --hsm-root=/tmp/arc1/sanity-hsm.test_254b/ --daemon --pid-file=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid  "/mnt/lustre2" < /dev/null > "/autotest/autotest-2/2025-09-16/lustre-master_full-part-2_4654_128_44af1cd8-34ed-4626-b53e-f78694503a4a//sanity-hsm.test_254b.copytool_log.onyx-155vm137.log" 2>&1
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.max_requests
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.max_requests='54'
Checking archive requests
CMD: onyx-155vm137 pkill --pidfile=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --signal=STOP hsmtool
Copytool is suspended on onyx-155vm137
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.archive_count
CMD: onyx-155vm137 pkill --pidfile=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --signal=CONT hsmtool
Copytool is continued on onyx-155vm137
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.archive_count
Checking restore requests
CMD: onyx-155vm137 pkill --pidfile=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --signal=STOP hsmtool
Copytool is suspended on onyx-155vm137
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions
CMD: onyx-155vm139 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.restore_count
 sanity-hsm test_254b: @@@@@@ FAIL: Expected '54' (!= '48')  active restore requests

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4654 - 5.14.0-570.37.1.el9_6.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/107 - 4.18.0-553.53.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-hsm test_254b - Expected '54' (!= '48') active restore requests
item.summary: interop sanity-hsm test_254b: FAIL: Expected '54' (!= '48') active restore requests

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
